title: Realtime Analytics
summary: High-throughput data streaming and visualization dashboard.
description_challenge: The critical challenge was engineering an analytics pipeline capable of capturing, processing, and rendering high-throughput data streams in real-time, operating with extremely tight latency margins under heavy load. Developing a highly optimized UI that avoided unnecessary react re-renders was paramount.
execution_features: Engineered robust websocket state pipelines with zero-lag connections
Created highly optimized chart and graph components managing huge dataset chunks
Designed an intuitive centralized dashboard prioritizing rapid cognitive absorption
advanced_metrics: Sustained sub-50ms ingestion-to-render latency across a continuous flow of over 10k datapoints/second while keeping main thread unblocked.

title: Resume Intelligence
summary: AI-powered contextual resume parsing and evaluation engine.
description_challenge: Traditional ATS scanners fail to capture semantic meaning and nuances. The objective was to build an intelligent, context-aware engine that could evaluate candidate resumes against complex job requisitions beyond generic keyword mapping, bridging the gap between raw data and qualitative analysis.
execution_features: Developed a robust backend for secure data ingestion and API facilitation
Integrated Advanced LLM pipelines for accurate contextual and semantic matching
Implemented highly efficient vector embedding storage for hyper-fast semantic querying
advanced_metrics: Increased recruiter shortlisting efficiency by 40% while maintaining a 95% relevance match rate via rigorous vector tuning.

title: Debugging Assistant
summary: Automated code diagnosis and AST-based problem resolution tool.
description_challenge: Developers spend exorbitant time context-switching between tools to diagnose syntactical or logical bugs. The system required a seamless deep-parsing architecture to understand Abstract Syntax Trees, detect anomalies, and suggest safe context-aware code patches on the fly.
execution_features: Implemented real-time code analysis utilizing powerful AST parsing logic
Designed a sleek and minimal IDE-like interface for intuitive error reading
Integrated machine learning heuristics for targeted hot-fix code suggestions
advanced_metrics: Reduced typical debugging cycles by 25% by identifying off-by-one errors and logical dead-ends before direct execution testing.
